title: Zomboi Pack
body:
**A Simplistic Vanilla-styled PVP & Adventure texture pack for 1.8 and 1.9.**

Zomboi Pack makes the default textures look a tiny bit more simplistic but more bright and alive as a result of months of non-stop work on this texture pack from the creator.

# **Release 1.8.9 Preview:**
![Zomboi Pack 1.8.9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d153690ccbc3cbb1aeacb3b909a8769ae4684611.png)

Zomboi pack also introduces some more quality of life features like bordered ore, improved GUI, a crosshair that's designed specifically for pvp and low fire so when you get lit on fire, it doesn't take up like 50% of your screen.


(Subscribe to the creator on youtube: [https://www.youtube.com/@DrCoolZomboi/featured](https://www.youtube.com/@DrCoolZomboi)
